name: TEXAS CAPITAL BANCSHARES INC/TX
summary: Background Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (TCBI or the Company) is a registered bank holding company and a full-service financial services firm that delivers customized solutions to businesses, entrepreneurs and individual customers. TCBI is headquartered in Dallas, with primary banking offices in Austin, Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston and San Antonio, and has built a network of clients across the country.
